name: timeout-policy
description: Defines timeout limits for the Layer 3 Extraction Manager — per-URL, per-engine, and overall extraction timeouts.

perUrlTimeout.description: Maximum time allowed for a single URL extraction attempt

perEngineTimeout.description: Maximum time allowed per engine attempt

chrome-devtools-mcp.note: Browser automation may be slow for complex pages

overallExtractionTimeout.description: Maximum time allowed for entire extraction session
overallExtractionTimeout.note: 1 hour default for full site extraction

timeoutActions.description: Actions to take when timeouts occur
